TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavCon-angry_pilaw_abas
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.TRANSL: I will tell a story that happened in the past.

S.FORM: e zau teRaqanna aitanan mai tu kelisiw saizi nani.
S.PHON: ə z~rau təʁaqanna aitanan mai tu kərisiw saiz~ri nani.
S.FORM: e zau teRaqanna aitanan mai tu kelisiw saizi nani.
S.PHON: ə z~rau təʁaqanna aitanan mai tu kərisiw saiz~ri nani.
S.TRANSL: 為了我們沒有錢的事情這樣.

S.FORM: uany nani Rahitay ya tiaRay 'nay nani.
S.PHON: uanj nani ʁahitaj ja tiaʁaj ʔnaj nani.
S.FORM: uany nani Rahitay ya tiaRay 'nay nani.
S.PHON: uanj nani ʁahitaj ja tiaʁaj ʔnaj nani.

S.FORM: tu pameng yau ya pakelawkawayan pasangian tu tianhua nani.
S.PHON: tu paməŋ jau ja pakərawkawajan pasaŋian tu tianhua nani.
S.FORM: tu pameng yau ya pakelawkawayan pasangian tu tianhua nani.
S.PHON: tu paməŋ jau ja pakərawkawajan pasaŋian tu tianhua nani.
S.TRANSL: 突然有做電話的工人來.
Suddenly, there came workers who worked on telecommunication.

S.FORM: o ho tingaday qaya tienhua tienhua saizi smanu tamaikuan tu tu zau maiisu qumuni kiwku.
S.PHON: * h* tiŋaɮaj qaja tiənhua tiənhua saiz~ri smanu tamaikuan tu tu z~rau maiisu qumuni kiwku.
S.FORM: o ho tingaday qaya tienhua tienhua saizi smanu tamaikuan tu tu zau maiisu qumuni kiwku.
S.PHON: * h* tiŋaɮaj qaja tiənhua tiənhua saiz~ri smanu tamaikuan tu tu z~rau maiisu qumuni kiwku.

TRANSL.notes: 哦 (有一天) Ngaday 告訴我說, "Kiwku, 你現在也沒在做什麼事".

S.TRANSL: 哦 Ngaday 告訴我說, "Kiwku, 你現在也沒在做什麼事".
Oh, Ngaday told me that, 'You, Kiwku, don't have any work to do.'
I have no work to do.

S.FORM: 'nay pasangian tu tianhua zinna ni ngaday tu.
S.PHON: ʔnaj pasaŋian tu tianhua z~rinna ni ŋaɮaj tu.
S.FORM: 'nay pasangian tu tianhua zinna ni ngaday tu.
S.PHON: ʔnaj pasaŋian tu tianhua z~rinna ni ŋaɮaj tu.
S.TRANSL: There were workers who did telecommunication.

S.FORM: kasianemtiiku spaRita qibasi tu qudusna zinku.
S.PHON: kasianəmtiiku spaʁita qiβasi tu quɮusna z~rinku.
S.FORM: kasianemtiiku spaRita qibasi tu qudusna zinku.
S.PHON: kasianəmtiiku spaʁita qiβasi tu quɮusna z~rinku.
S.TRANSL: 我心想我為何要洗別人的衣服.
I wonder why I should wash their clothes.

S.FORM: qu ahyangku nani quni qibasi si mana.
S.PHON: qu ahjaŋku nani quni qiβasi si mana.
S.FORM: qu ahyangku nani quni qibasi si mana.
S.PHON: qu ahjaŋku nani quni qiβasi si mana.

TRANSL.notes: 我哥哥(說), '也可以洗衣服啊!'

S.TRANSL: 我哥哥 , '也可以洗衣服啊!'

S.FORM: azu mai qabulaan tu kelisiw zinnaiku 'nay tu.
S.PHON: az~ru mai qaβuraan tu kərisiw z~rinnaiku ʔnaj tu.
S.FORM: azu mai qabulaan tu kelisiw zinnaiku 'nay tu.
S.PHON: az~ru mai qaβuraan tu kərisiw z~rinnaiku ʔnaj tu.

TRANSL.notes: 他對我說, '好像他們不給錢似的,(又不是沒給錢)'.

S.TRANSL: 他對我說, '好像他們不給錢似的, '.
He said to me, 'It seems like they wouldn't give you money.'
我就說好, 我就答應了.

S.FORM: yauti tingaday tumungaw tamaikuan tu qudus a yau tu.
S.PHON: jauti tiŋaɮaj tumuŋaw tamaikuan tu quɮus a jau tu.
S.FORM: yauti tingaday tumungaw tamaikuan tu qudus a yau tu.
S.PHON: jauti tiŋaɮaj tumuŋaw tamaikuan tu quɮus a jau tu.
S.TRANSL: Ngaday came and gave me the clothes.

S.FORM: buyingiku zinna ni ngaday 'nay mailiw qaniyau kelawkaway masang nani.
S.PHON: βujiŋiku z~rinna ni ŋaɮaj ʔnaj mairiw qanijau kərawkawaj masaŋ nani.
S.FORM: buyingiku zinna ni ngaday 'nay mailiw qaniyau kelawkaway masang nani.
S.PHON: βujiŋiku z~rinna ni ŋaɮaj ʔnaj mairiw qanijau kərawkawaj masaŋ nani.
S.TRANSL: Ngaday說: 我沒空. 他們輪流工作.
'I'm busy,' said Ngaday. They took turns working.

S.FORM: tu a kwa ya wiyatiiku ya qibasi nani.
S.PHON: tu a kwa ja wijatiiku ja qiβasi nani.
S.FORM: tu a kwa ya wiyatiiku ya qibasi nani.
S.PHON: tu a kwa ja wijatiiku ja qiβasi nani.
S.TRANSL: 我就去啦, 開始洗衣服啦.
I started to wash the clothes.
The clothes that I washed were dried.

S.FORM: yauti ya pasa izaanay pakelawkawayan 'nay tu tienhua nani.
S.PHON: jauti ja pasa iz~raanaj pakərawkawajan ʔnaj tu tiənhua nani.
S.FORM: yauti ya pasa izaanay pakelawkawayan 'nay tu tienhua nani.
S.PHON: jauti ja pasa iz~raanaj pakərawkawajan ʔnaj tu tiənhua nani.

S.FORM: a zau maisengti ya niqibasian tu qudusniq zinna.
S.PHON: a z~rau maisəŋti ja niqiβasian tu quɮusniq z~rinna.
S.FORM: a zau maisengti ya niqibasian tu qudusniq zinna.
S.PHON: a z~rau maisəŋti ja niqiβasian tu quɮusniq z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: 這個我們洗的衣服乾了嗎?

S.FORM: zinna ni aRay saiza ipilan ni aRay nani.
S.PHON: z~rinna ni aʁaj saiz~ra ipiran ni aʁaj nani.
S.FORM: zinna ni aRay saiza ipilan ni aRay nani.
S.PHON: z~rinna ni aʁaj saiz~ra ipiran ni aʁaj nani.

S.FORM: tu a maisengti yu zinku antangi qawtuanniq mala zinna pakelawkawayan nayau tu.
S.PHON: tu a maisəŋti ju z~rinku antaŋi qawtuanniq mara z~rinna pakərawkawajan najau tu.
S.FORM: tu a maisengti yu zinku antangi qawtuanniq mala zinna pakelawkawayan nayau tu.
S.PHON: tu a maisəŋti ju z~rinku antaŋi qawtuanniq mara z~rinna pakərawkawajan najau tu.
S.TRANSL: "哦, 乾了", 我說. "我們等一下來拿", 他們說.

TRANSL.notes: "Oh, they were already dry," I said. "We will come later to take (our clothes)', said the workers.

S.TRANSL: "Oh, they were already dry," I said. "We will come later to take ', said the workers.

S.FORM: qametannati XXXX ni a anem ya aRay wa.
S.PHON: qamətannati **** ni a anəm ja aʁaj wa.
S.FORM: qametannati XXXX ni a anem ya aRay wa.
S.PHON: qamətannati **** ni a anəm ja aʁaj wa.

S.FORM: nayau XXXX m maiimi tmanan ya.
nayau XXXX m maiimi tmanan ya.
en ya mana ada ngidananti zinna saiza ni aRay tu wiyati RaRiwantiiku ya tu.
S.PHON: ən ja mana aɮa ŋiɮananti z~rinna saiz~ra ni aʁaj tu wijati ʁaʁiwantiiku ja tu.
S.FORM: en ya mana ada ngidananti zinna saiza ni aRay tu wiyati RaRiwantiiku ya tu.
S.PHON: ən ja mana aɮa ŋiɮananti z~rinna saiz~ra ni aʁaj tu wijati ʁaʁiwantiiku ja tu.
S.TRANSL: 'I want to go to...,' thought ARay.

TRANSL.notes: (He) went to our aunt, Zingay's place.

S.TRANSL: went to our aunt, Zingay's place.

TRANSL.notes: Call your father (to come home for dinner).

S.FORM: taqa yu abu yau tayan qman zinna.
S.PHON: taqa ju aβu jau tajan qman z~rinna.
S.FORM: taqa yu abu yau tayan qman zinna.
S.PHON: taqa ju aβu jau tajan qman z~rinna.

TRANSL.notes: Zinan 說, '(他)不要, 阿母, (爸爸他)在那邊吃了'.

S.TRANSL: Zinan 說, ' 不要, 阿母, 在那邊吃了'.

TRANSL.notes: Zinan said, 'Mom, (Father) did not want to (come home); (he) had dinner there.'

S.TRANSL: Zinan said, 'Mom, did not want to ; had dinner there.'

S.FORM: a azu qman tu Raq zin ni zinan.
S.PHON: a az~ru qman tu ʁaq z~rin ni z~rinan.
S.FORM: a azu qman tu Raq zin ni zinan.
S.PHON: a az~ru qman tu ʁaq z~rin ni z~rinan.

S.FORM: kidadanna sayza qman tu Raq zinku.
S.PHON: kiɮaɮanna sajz~ra qman tu ʁaq z~rinku.
S.FORM: kidadanna sayza qman tu Raq zinku.
S.PHON: kiɮaɮanna sajz~ra qman tu ʁaq z~rinku.
S.TRANSL: It doesn't matter that he drank.

S.FORM: azkaw sebiti ya sunis a zau.
S.PHON: az~rkaw səβiti ja sunis a z~rau.
S.FORM: azkaw sebiti ya sunis a zau.
S.PHON: az~rkaw səβiti ja sunis a z~rau.

S.TRANSL: I fed the three children first.

S.FORM: nani mana XXXX nengiti tazian qaliwan XXXX qanan.
S.PHON: nani mana **** nəŋiti taz~rian qariwan **** qanan.
S.FORM: nani mana XXXX nengiti tazian qaliwan XXXX qanan.
S.PHON: nani mana **** nəŋiti taz~rian qariwan **** qanan.
S.TRANSL: It doesn't matter that he had meals there.

S.FORM: zinku mai tu tangi nani yauti aw maiiku tapawan simunangisu zinna.
S.PHON: z~rinku mai tu taŋi nani jauti aw maiiku tapawan simunaŋisu z~rinna.
S.FORM: zinku mai tu tangi nani yauti aw maiiku tapawan simunangisu zinna.
S.PHON: z~rinku mai tu taŋi nani jauti aw maiiku tapawan simunaŋisu z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: 我不在,你跟人家約會, 他這麼說.
'When I was not at home, you had affairs,' said he.

S.FORM: oh niana qibasiansu o nayau a tazungan.
oh niana qibasiansu o nayau a tazungan.
S.TRANSL: 你為什麼要洗人家的衣服,女孩子就是那樣.
Why did you wash others' clothes? Girls are like that.

S.FORM: a pisapat kmilim tu zau zinna.
S.PHON: a pisapat kmirim tu z~rau z~rinna.
S.FORM: a pisapat kmilim tu zau zinna.
S.PHON: a pisapat kmirim tu z~rau z~rinna.

TRANSL.notes: '你隨便找(麻煩)' 他這樣說.

S.TRANSL: 'You were asking for trouble,' said he.
'我不在的時候,你就是這樣', 他這樣說.
'When I wasn't at home, you were like that,' said he.

S.FORM: akaw sayza qibasiiku nani namani yau ni lazat a yau talepawanta.
S.PHON: akaw sajz~ra qiβasiiku nani namani jau ni raz~rat a jau tarəpawanta.
S.FORM: akaw sayza qibasiiku nani namani yau ni lazat a yau talepawanta.
S.PHON: akaw sajz~ra qiβasiiku nani namani jau ni raz~rat a jau tarəpawanta.
S.TRANSL: 我洗衣服的時候,那個人有在我們家嗎?
While I was washing the clothes, was that person at our home?

S.FORM: pasangian smangi tu lintu yu ipilika ya tingaday zinku.
S.PHON: pasaŋian smaŋi tu rintu ju ipirika ja tiŋaɮaj z~rinku.
S.FORM: pasangian smangi tu lintu yu ipilika ya tingaday zinku.
S.PHON: pasaŋian smaŋi tu rintu ju ipirika ja tiŋaɮaj z~rinku.
S.TRANSL: '他們是做電的,你去問Ngaday' 我這樣說.
'They are workers of telecommunication. You could ask Ngaday,' said I.

S.FORM: mai ya tingaday pawRatannaiku nani anu nayau maiiku qibasi.
S.PHON: mai ja tiŋaɮaj pawʁatannaiku nani anu najau maiiku qiβasi.
S.FORM: mai ya tingaday pawRatannaiku nani anu nayau maiiku qibasi.
S.PHON: mai ja tiŋaɮaj pawʁatannaiku nani anu najau maiiku qiβasi.
S.TRANSL: 要不是ngaday要我做,我也不會洗衣服.
If Ngaday hadn't asked me to do it, I wouldn't have washed their clothes.

S.FORM: qu tikingciang qibasiika ya qawman bulaan tu kelisiw zin ni kingciang.
S.PHON: qu tikiŋʦiaŋ qiβasiika ja qawman βuraan tu kərisiw z~rin ni kiŋʦiaŋ.
S.FORM: qu tikingciang qibasiika ya qawman bulaan tu kelisiw zin ni kingciang.
S.PHON: qu tikiŋʦiaŋ qiβasiika ja qawman βuraan tu kərisiw z~rin ni kiŋʦiaŋ.

TRANSL.notes: Kingciang說就洗衣服啊,(他們)一定會給錢.

S.TRANSL: Kingciang說就洗衣服啊, 一定會給錢.

TRANSL.notes: Kingciang said, 'Wash the clothes. (They) will definitely give you money.'

S.TRANSL: Kingciang said, 'Wash the clothes. will definitely give you money.'
So I agreed to wash their clothes.

W.TRANSL: 重疊-罵三字經-處焦-3SG.屬格=1SG.主格

S.TRANSL: '我不要這樣的女孩子', 他這樣說.

TRANSL.notes: '(I) don't want this kind of wife,' said he.

S.TRANSL: ' don't want this kind of wife,' said he.

S.FORM: mai nianemankuisu si zin na anemku tabuanku.
S.PHON: mai nianəmankuisu si z~rin na anəmku taβuanku.
S.FORM: mai nianemankuisu si zin na anemku tabuanku.
S.PHON: mai nianəmankuisu si z~rin na anəmku taβuanku.
S.TRANSL: 我不喜歡你. 我放在心裡沒講出來.

TRANSL.notes: I don't love you (anymore). I kept it in my heart. (I wrapped it in my heart.)

S.TRANSL: I don't love you . I kept it in my heart.

S.FORM: atu nayau ya tu o o tama tipiwi qayau miza yu bangbang tata o nayau zi kwa tazungan.
S.PHON: atu najau ja tu * * tama tipiwi qajau miz~ra ju βaŋβaŋ tata * najau z~ri kwa taz~ruŋan.
S.FORM: atu nayau ya tu o o tama tipiwi qayau miza yu bangbang tata o nayau zi kwa tazungan.
S.PHON: atu najau ja tu * * tama tipiwi qajau miz~ra ju βaŋβaŋ tata * najau z~ri kwa taz~ruŋan.
S.TRANSL: Piwi added fuel to the fire.

S.FORM: yauti ya ti tenganku pa tiaRay s snayau pisapat mqila tu tenganku zinna.
S.PHON: jauti ja ti təŋanku pa tiaʁaj s snajau pisapat mqira tu təŋanku z~rinna.
S.FORM: yauti ya ti tenganku pa tiaRay s snayau pisapat mqila tu tenganku zinna.
S.PHON: jauti ja ti təŋanku pa tiaʁaj s snajau pisapat mqira tu təŋanku z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: 你為什麼隨便罵我的弟妹?
Why did you scold my sister-in-law?
He scolded my sister-in-law as well.

S.FORM: tangi a tepusannati ni shuyzun saiza mipil nibibidasna tamaikuan.
S.PHON: taŋi a təpusannati ni shujz~run saiz~ra mipir niβiβiɮasna tamaikuan.
S.FORM: tangi a tepusannati ni shuyzun saiza mipil nibibidasna tamaikuan.
S.PHON: taŋi a təpusannati ni shujz~run saiz~ra mipir niβiβiɮasna tamaikuan.
S.TRANSL: Shuyzun couldn't listen to him curse me anymore.

S.FORM: aRay ya zin ni shuyzun pisapatisu mqila ta napawansu.
S.PHON: aʁaj ja z~rin ni shujz~run pisapatisu mqira ta napawansu.
S.FORM: aRay ya zin ni shuyzun pisapatisu mqila ta napawansu.
S.PHON: aʁaj ja z~rin ni shujz~run pisapatisu mqira ta napawansu.
S.TRANSL: 你為什麼隨便罵你的老婆?
Why did you scold your wife?

TRANSL.notes: 我保證(她沒有做壞事,因為)我每天看你老婆.

S.TRANSL: 我保證 我每天看你老婆.

TRANSL.notes: I ensure that (your wife didn't misbehave because) I saw her every day.

S.TRANSL: I ensure that I saw her every day.

S.FORM: mai yu azu 'laq napawansu zinnati ni shuyzun.
S.PHON: mai ju az~ru ʔraq napawansu z~rinnati ni shujz~run.
S.FORM: mai yu azu 'laq napawansu zinnati ni shuyzun.
S.PHON: mai ju az~ru ʔraq napawansu z~rinnati ni shujz~run.
S.TRANSL: '你的老婆不像別人' Shuyzun這樣說.
'Your wife is not like others,' said Shuyzun.

S.FORM: anu naquni zinsu haw yau aiku baozhenganna aisu tu zau.
S.PHON: anu naquni z~rinsu haw jau aiku βa*z~rhəŋanna aisu tu z~rau.
S.FORM: anu naquni zinsu haw yau aiku baozhenganna aisu tu zau.
S.PHON: anu naquni z~rinsu haw jau aiku βa*z~rhəŋanna aisu tu z~rau.
ʁaβi ʔnaj nani kmirimtiiku tu kjataja.
ʁaβi ʔnaj nani kmirimtiiku tu kjataja.

S.TRANSL: 我每天走來走去工作,很累.
I walked to and fro while working. I feel tired.
He is still mean to me.

S.FORM: naquni kawka nengi mai tu kelisiw na.
S.PHON: naquni kawka nəŋi mai tu kərisiw na.
S.FORM: naquni kawka nengi mai tu kelisiw na.
S.PHON: naquni kawka nəŋi mai tu kərisiw na.
S.TRANSL: 怎樣才能有錢? 沒有錢吶.
What should we do? We do not have money.

S.FORM: anu yau kelisiw haw maiiku qibasi.
S.PHON: anu jau kərisiw haw maiiku qiβasi.
S.FORM: anu yau kelisiw haw maiiku qibasi.
S.PHON: anu jau kərisiw haw maiiku qiβasi.
S.TRANSL: 有錢的話我不會去洗衣服.
If we had had money, I wouldn't have washed the clothes.
This thing would not have happened.
死了就什麼是也不知道了.
If I die, I won't know anything.

TRANSL.notes: 上次剩下的藥. (我)收起來.

S.TRANSL: 上次剩下的藥. 收起來.
There must be some remaining pesticides.
I kept looking for it. I didn't find it.
I didn't find it. It was already dawn.

S.FORM: en tabRabi nani taytaanku maiti yu tiaRay.
S.PHON: ən taβʁaβi nani tajtaanku maiti ju tiaʁaj.
S.FORM: en tabRabi nani taytaanku maiti yu tiaRay.
S.PHON: ən taβʁaβi nani tajtaanku maiti ju tiaʁaj.

S.FORM: sunisku maipama qman sa taRabi nani.
S.PHON: sunisku maipama qman sa taʁaβi nani.
S.FORM: sunisku maipama qman sa taRabi nani.
S.PHON: sunisku maipama qman sa taʁaβi nani.
S.TRANSL: My child hadn't had breakfast yet.

S.FORM: nani tu taqsi taqaimu sunis a zau muna qman.
S.PHON: nani tu taqsi taqaimu sunis a z~rau muna qman.
S.FORM: nani tu taqsi taqaimu sunis a zau muna qman.
S.PHON: nani tu taqsi taqaimu sunis a z~rau muna qman.
S.TRANSL: The child had to eat first.
小孩子要去上學怎麼辦?
The child had to go to school.

S.FORM: mlanaimi kyami zinku qmantiimi sataRabi tu.
S.PHON: mranaimi kjami z~rinku qmantiimi sataʁaβi tu.
S.FORM: mlanaimi kyami zinku qmantiimi sataRabi tu.
S.PHON: mranaimi kjami z~rinku qmantiimi sataʁaβi tu.
S.TRANSL: 我們等不到, 我們先吃.

S.FORM: nayau ya qmnutiku tu ngid qan tu iyu.
S.PHON: najau ja qmnutiku tu ŋiɮ qan tu iju.
S.FORM: nayau ya qmnutiku tu ngid qan tu iyu.
S.PHON: najau ja qmnutiku tu ŋiɮ qan tu iju.

TRANSL.notes: 我很生氣,想要吃藥(自殺).
I was so angry that I wanted to take medicine (to commit suicide).

S.TRANSL: I was so angry that I wanted to take medicine .

S.FORM: nayau nayau qmnutita ngidita qan tu iyu saizi.
S.PHON: najau najau qmnutita ŋiɮita qan tu iju saiz~ri.
S.FORM: nayau nayau qmnutita ngidita qan tu iyu saizi.
S.PHON: najau najau qmnutita ŋiɮita qan tu iju saiz~ri.

TRANSL.notes: 我們很生氣,想要吃藥(自殺).
We were angry and wanted to take medicine (to commit suicide).

S.TRANSL: We were angry and wanted to take medicine .
